notes: Public Admin GraphQL 2026-04 UserError for fulfillmentEventCreate exposes field/message but not code.
Selecting userErrors.code returns a top-level undefinedField error before resolver execution.
Invalid FulfillmentEventStatus variables fail GraphQL coercion with INVALID_VARIABLE before resolver execution.
FulfillmentEventStatus introspection includes DELAYED and CARRIER_PICKED_UP in Admin GraphQL 2026-04.
The cancelledFulfillmentEventCreateProbe records public API behavior after fulfillmentCancel; HAR-582 local runtime keeps the source-backed cancellation guard.

errors.message: Variable $fulfillmentEvent of type FulfillmentEventInput! was provided invalid value for status (Expected "NOT_A_FULFILLMENT_EVENT_STATUS" to be one of: LABEL_PURCHASED, LABEL_PRINTED, READY_FOR_PICKUP, CONFIRMED, IN_TRANSIT, OUT_FOR_DELIVERY, ATTEMPTED_DELIVERY, DELAYED, DELIVERED, FAILURE, CARRIER_PICKED_UP)

problems.explanation: Expected "NOT_A_FULFILLMENT_EVENT_STATUS" to be one of: LABEL_PURCHASED, LABEL_PRINTED, READY_FOR_PICKUP, CONFIRMED, IN_TRANSIT, OUT_FOR_DELIVERY, ATTEMPTED_DELIVERY, DELAYED, DELIVERED, FAILURE, CARRIER_PICKED_UP
